fixture.description: A post-login handler redirects to a URL taken straight from the request with no validation — an open redirect usable for phishing.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that postLogin redirects to the user-controlled `next` value without validating it (e.g. allowlist, same-origin check, or relative-path-only), enabling an open redirect that can be abused for phishing/credential theft. It should recommend validating the target. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the open-redirect risk is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Security agent flags the unvalidated redirect target as an open redirect
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT require an external consumer to confirm exploitability
Does NOT treat redirect() as inherently safe
